en: This thought has obviously therefore been imprinted on the human brain for untold ages. That is why it lies ready in the unconscious of every one. Only certain conditions are needed in order to let it appear again. These conditions were obviously fulfilled in the example of Robert Mayer. The greatest and best thoughts form themselves upon these primordial images, which are the ancient common property of humanity.
zh: 此思想顯然因此已在人類大腦中印記了無數世代。這就是為何它潛伏在每個人的無意識中，只需特定條件便能讓它再次浮現。這些條件在羅伯特·邁爾的例子中顯然得到了滿足。最偉大、最卓越的思想，正是基於這些原初意象而形成，它們是人類古老的共同遺產。
